response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has an impressive 20-year polyglot engineering career and genuine entrepreneurial spirit, but falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy profile. The role demands recognized, demonstrated AI expertise with shipped AI products or platforms, director-level IC influence, and cloud architecture fluency at scale. Her AI exposure is limited to roughly one month of agentic tooling work at re:cinq, she holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and her background shows no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, or operating at the organizational influence level the role requires. The breadth of her experience is a genuine asset, but it does not compensate for the depth gaps in AI and cloud strategy.
strengths: 20 years of continuous, diverse technical delivery across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains exceeds the experience threshold
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive: founded and sustained GISCollective (2016–present), took over iOS development at WatchUp and ranked in US top 10
Active community contributor through workshops, conference talks, and open source libraries, showing an ability to inspire and teach
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — only ~1 month of AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq), with no shipped AI products or platforms that would constitute recognized industry expertise

No meaningful cloud platform depth or cloud architecture experience at scale; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz and Kubernetes self-hosting are insufficient for advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption

No evidence of director-level IC scope: no cross-organizational technical leadership, no strategic customer advisory, and no record of influencing product or engineering strategy beyond the team level

key_factors.factor: Entrepreneurial and open source track record
